case_title: LEUNG, DARRYL C vs. ESTRERA, BRIAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, DARRYL C SERVED SEP-13-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRERA, BRIAN TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, IF ANY, NAMED CLAIMANTS, IF ANY, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES
